reviews.comment:
Hay muy mal olor del pozo ciego , derramándose por el playón ( que se pisa Inevitablemente)
También hubo DERRAMES DE GAS OIL sobre la colectora provocando ACCIDENTES DE MOTOCICLISTAS  ( fui testigo de ver  6 motos PATINANDO y sus conductores con daños en sus vehículos más varios AUTOMÓVILES patinando en la calzada con peligro GRAVE de daños a terceros
Los RESPONSABLES de la YPF en el acto de advertirles el peligro NO TOMARON NI UNA MADEDIDA AL RESPECTO

(Translated by Google)
There's a terrible smell coming from the septic tank, spilling onto the parking area (which people inevitably walk on). There were also diesel fuel spills on the service road, causing motorcycle accidents (I witnessed six motorcycles skidding and their drivers with damage to their vehicles, plus several cars skidding on the road, posing a serious risk of damage to others). The YPF managers, despite being warned of the danger, took absolutely no action.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbkx2dEZ3EAE
